name: UWM Sports Complex
quest: "Lost my game ball, lost my rhythm — but give me a spotter on the free throws and I'll find it again fast. Sink enough and I'm unstoppable out there. Let's go!"

name: Rudy's Cafe
quest: "I've taken over the espresso machine and I'm pouring latte art to my own beat — the bells on my anklet keeping time, just like on the dance floor. Catch the rhythm with me before the foam falls flat!"

name: UWM North · IT
quest: "The servers picked the worst possible morning to act up — right before a call with my biggest client. I need someone sharp to call out the right light before I lose the deal. I don't have all day."

name: UWM South · Sales
quest: "A good manager keeps time, and a good lead is just a case that hasn't been solved yet. Trace it with me, in the right order, and we'll close this right on schedule. My horse is patient. I am less so."
